{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Forged weapon
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Gokren]] used a [[Forged weapon]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
